From Maciej (ts=1776649988.110059): <@U0AQE94HJUT>, we have 4 main technical goals/milestone next week I think:
1. EMASS flight tests (<@U04CZK4K7P0> , <@U06CCFTNBS6>, and <@U01511MEQ90>)
2. S0-VTOL restart to find and fix the crash bug (<@U058LGYMEQ0> and <@U014ZL9FLE9>)
3. S3 work to find the crash bug and flight test on S1-22 and hover test S3 (<@U06NQAYBLRK>, <@U01511MEQ90>, and <@U014U9WMK2A>)
4. Mustang Progress (<@U06CCFTNBS6> and <@U058LGYMEQ0>)
Those should all be capture in Asana (I ju
